--- head/textproc/p5-Vroom/Makefile	Tue Aug 28 11:59:02 2012	(r303275)
+++ head/textproc/p5-Vroom/Makefile	Tue Aug 28 11:59:47 2012	(r303276)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	Vroom
-PORTVERSION=	0.25
+PORTVERSION=	0.27
 CATEGORIES=	textproc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:INGY
@@ -15,11 +15,11 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Slide Shows in Vim
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-IO-All>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-IO-All \
-		p5-YAML-LibYAML>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-YAML-LibYAML \
-		p5-Class-Field>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Field \
-		p5-File-HomeDir>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-File-HomeDir \
-		p5-Template-Toolkit-Simple>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Template-Toolkit-Simple
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-File-HomeDir>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-File-HomeDir \
+		p5-IO-All>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-IO-All \
+		p5-Template-Toolkit-Simple>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Template-Toolkit-Simple \
+		p5-Term-Size>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Term-Size \
+		p5-YAML-LibYAML>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-YAML-LibYAML
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
